章节结构.核心任务: 引入研究领域的宏观背景，阐述研究主题在实际应用或科学理论中的重要性，确立研究的必要性和价值。

章节结构.子节名称: 问题陈述与现有局限 (Problem Statement & Limitations)
章节结构.核心任务: 指出当前主流技术、方法或数据集存在的缺陷、面临的挑战或未解决的痛点，为本文的提出建立逻辑起点（Research Gap）。

章节结构.子节名称: 本文方法与核心思想 (Proposed Method & Core Idea)
章节结构.核心任务: 针对上述局限性，提出本文的创新解决方案，简述核心算法、框架或理论假设，说明其如何克服现有问题。

章节结构.子节名称: 主要贡献与成果概述 (Main Contributions & Outcomes)
章节结构.核心任务: 以条理化的方式（如列表）明确列出本文的具体创新点、技术贡献或实验验证成果，让读者快速把握论文的核心价值。

Introduction.内容逻辑: 整体遵循从宏观到微观的“漏斗型（Funnel）”递进逻辑。首先通过“背景”拓宽视野，确立研究价值；接着通过转折词（如However, Unfortunately）收窄焦点，暴露出“现有局限”与研究空白；随后顺理成章地引出“本文方法”作为填补空白的解决方案；最后通过“主要贡献”将宏观方案落地为具体的创新点。各子节间通过“确立价值 -> 发现缺陷 -> 提出方案 -> 总结贡献”的因果与转折关系紧密衔接。

论证手法.具体应用: 在背景部分使用权威统计数据量化问题的重要性。例如：引用“accounting for approximately one-third of total worldwide energy usage”或“spend over 90% of their daily time indoors”来强调建筑能耗和室内热舒适研究的紧迫性。
在局限性分析中，将现有方法分类对比以凸显缺陷。例如：对比“侵入式(Intrusive)”、“半侵入式(Semi-intrusive)”和“非侵入式(Non-invasive)”测量方法的优缺点；或对比“Lambertian（漫反射）”与“glossy（光泽）”表面在现有深度估计中的表现差异。
通过具体场景或设备使抽象问题具象化。例如：列举“glass windows of buildings”、“reflective surfaces of cars”说明透明/镜面物体的普遍性；列举“smart wristbands”、“glasses”说明半侵入式设备的具体形态。
通过密集引用前人工作（如[12, 17], [64]）来佐证当前技术的发展现状，并在指出局限性时引用具体失败案例或理论瓶颈（如“the dichromatic model fails to hold for materials like metals [28]”），增强批判的客观性。

研究背景与动机.核心句式: In [context/field], [topic] plays a critical role / remains a challenging problem for [target audience/application].
研究背景与动机.原文示例: In our daily lives, we often interact with several objects of various appearances... accurately estimating depth information on these surfaces remains a challenging problem for both computer vision algorithms and deep networks.

问题陈述与现有局限.核心句式: However, most current / conventional [methods/approaches] [do something], making them [negative outcome/limitation].
问题陈述与现有局限.原文示例: However, most current depth estimation methods support only Lambertian scenes, making them unreliable for glossy surfaces.

本文方法与核心思想.核心句式: In this paper, we present / propose a [method/strategy] that [core action/mechanism] to [solve the problem].
本文方法与核心思想.原文示例: In this paper, we present a depth and reflectance estimation algorithm that explicitly models spatially varying BRDFs (SVBRDFs) from light-field cameras.

主要贡献与成果概述.原文示例: Our main contributions are: 1) A generalization of optical flow to the non-Lambertian case in light-field cameras; 2) A depth estimation algorithm for light-field cameras that handles diffuse plus specular 1-lobe BRDFs.

章节结构.核心任务: 梳理光场相机深度估计的现有文献，指出传统方法对朗伯体假设的依赖以及在处理高光/光泽表面时的失效问题，从而引出本文的研究动机。
探讨与本文理论基础最相关的差分运动理论，明确本文在相机运动类型（纯平移）和视角变化处理上的理论创新与核心差异。
回顾阴影恢复形状（SFS）领域的经典与最新进展，借鉴其局部多项式优化策略，并强调本文在未知BRDF条件下的问题难度。

Related Work.内容逻辑: 各子节按照“直接应用场景 -> 核心理论基础 -> 相关传统视觉问题”的递进逻辑展开。过渡方式上，采用加粗小标题进行模块化物理分割。在每个子节内部，均遵循“介绍主流方法 -> 指出其前提假设或局限性 -> 介绍近期改进方法 -> 再次剖析其残余缺陷 -> 引出本文方法的对比优势（In contrast/However）”的“漏斗式”批判性逻辑，层层剥茧地论证本文方法的必要性与优越性。
论证手法: 对比论证：高频使用“In contrast”、“However”等转折词，将现有方法的局限性（如依赖Lambertian假设、二分类失效）与本文方法的普适性（如支持general 1-lobe BRDFs）进行直接对比。
举例论证：通过列举具体的物理材料（如metals）或特定的图像条件（如neighboring pixels have a similar color）来具象化现有模型（如dichromatic model）的失效场景。
引用论证：大量且密集地引用前人文献（如Tao et al., Chandraker等）作为批判的靶子或理论借鉴的基石，增强学术对话的严谨性。
条件/理论推导论证：通过分析数学或物理前提条件（如“if the view directions do not differ...”, “normal must be lying on a cone”）来严密论证现有理论在本文特定设定（纯平移光场）下的不适用性。

关键句式模板.指出主流方法及其固有局限: Many [task] methods for [domain] have been proposed. However, most of them rely on the [assumption] assumption and work poorly on [specific cases]. (原文: Many depth estimation methods for light-field cameras have been proposed. However, most of them rely on the Lambertian assumption and work poorly on glossy surfaces.)
关键句式模板.介绍近期改进并剖析其残余缺陷: Recently, there are some works that try to deal with [problem]. [Author] proposed a [method]... However, [limitation]. (原文: Recently, there are some works that try to deal with specularity. Tao et al. proposed a clustering method... However, they attempt a binary classification... which cannot handle general glossy surfaces.)
关键句式模板.强调本文方法的对比优势与突破: In contrast, our model can work on [broader conditions], and can also [additional capability], which has not been achieved by previous [domain] approaches. (原文: In contrast, our model can work on general 1-lobe BRDFs, and can also recover reflectance in addition to shape, which has not been achieved by previous light-field shape acquisition approaches.)
关键句式模板.阐述与最相关理论的核心差异: Our theoretical contributions are most closely related to the [theory] proposed by [Author]. Our work has [number] major differences. First, in contrast to [their approach], we [our approach]. (原文: Our theoretical contributions are most closely related to the differential theory proposed by Chandraker. Our work has three major differences. First, in contrast to the differential motions he uses... we only have translations...)
关键句式模板.借鉴现有策略并强调本文问题难度: We adopt this strategy in our [procedure]. However, note that our case is harder, since most [traditional] methods are limited to [assumption]. (原文: We adopt this strategy in our final optimization procedure. However, note that our case is harder, since most shape from shading methods are limited to Lambertian surfaces.)

章节结构.核心任务: 总览提出的方法框架（如TLA-DETR），明确研究目标（如解决红外数据稀缺下的检测问题），并高度概括核心原理和关键创新点（如两阶段迁移学习、冻结骨干网络等）。
详细阐述模型的具体结构，包括特征提取骨干网络（CNN backbone）、Transformer编码器/解码器以及前馈神经网络（FFNs）的设计与参数配置。

章节结构.子节名称: Two-stage Transfer Learning Strategy (两阶段迁移学习策略)
章节结构.核心任务: 详细说明跨域迁移学习的具体实施步骤，包括第一阶段在大规模可见光数据集上的预训练，以及第二阶段在红外域的微调策略（如参数共享、冻结与微调的具体模块）。

章节结构.子节名称: Loss Function and Optimization (损失函数与优化)
章节结构.核心任务: 定义模型训练的目标函数，解释各项损失（如分类损失、边界框回归损失）的计算方式及超参数设置。

Methodology.内容逻辑: 整体遵循“总-分”逻辑与“问题-方案-细节”的递进关系。首先通过Overview提出整体框架和核心思想（总），明确要解决的数据稀缺问题；随后按模型的数据流向和训练流程展开（分），先介绍静态的网络架构（空间维度），再介绍动态的两阶段训练策略（时间/流程维度），最后落脚于指导模型优化的损失函数。各子节间通过“框架概述 -> 结构支撑 -> 训练实现 -> 优化目标”的逻辑链条自然过渡。
论证手法: 目标导向论证：在概述中明确指出方法旨在解决的具体挑战（如infrared data scarcity），以此论证所提框架的必要性。
机制解释（原理解构）：通过拆解核心原理（如 freezing CNN backbone + parameter sharing + fine-tuning FFNs），解释方法如何实现高效域适应。
跨域对比论证：强调在“large-scale visible-light datasets”上预训练与“infrared domain”微调的跨域对比，凸显迁移学习的有效性。
模块化拆解：将复杂的迁移学习trick拆解为三个具体的参数操作模块（冻结、共享、微调），增强方法的可复现性和说服力。

Methodology Overview.核心句式: [Method Name] employs a [Framework Type], aiming to address the challenge of [Specific Problem] under [Specific Condition]. Its core principle involves [Step 1], then [Step 2] through [Key Innovation] to achieve [Final Goal].
Methodology Overview.原文示例: TLA-DETR employs a two-stage cross-domain transfer learning framework, aiming to address the challenge of efficient detection and location of indoor thermal adaptation behaviors under infrared data scarcity (few-shot learning conditions). Its core principle involves pre-training a robust feature extraction and detection architecture on large-scale visible-light datasets, then transferring visual information to the infrared domain through a unique transfer learning trick (freezing the CNN backbone + parameter sharing of the Transformer encoder/decoder + fine-tuning only the FFNs) to achieve efficient domain adaptation.

Network Architecture.核心句式: The proposed [Model Name] consists of [Component 1], [Component 2], and [Component 3]. Specifically, [Component 1] is responsible for [Function].
Network Architecture.原文示例: (基于原文推断) The proposed TLA-DETR consists of a CNN backbone, a Transformer encoder/decoder, and FFNs. Specifically, the CNN backbone is responsible for robust feature extraction.

Two-stage Transfer Learning Strategy.核心句式: To achieve [Goal], we employ a [Strategy Name]. In the first stage, we [Action 1]. In the second stage, [Action 2] is applied by [Specific Operations].
Two-stage Transfer Learning Strategy.原文示例: (基于原文提炼) To achieve efficient domain adaptation, we employ a two-stage cross-domain transfer learning framework. In the first stage, we pre-train the architecture on large-scale visible-light datasets. In the second stage, visual information is transferred to the infrared domain by freezing the CNN backbone, sharing parameters of the Transformer, and fine-tuning only the FFNs.

章节结构.子节名称: 实验设置与数据集 (Experimental Setup & Datasets)
章节结构.核心任务: 介绍实验所使用的公开数据集、合成数据集、评估指标（如MSE, Bad Pix）以及对比的基线方法（State-of-the-Art）。

章节结构.子节名称: 与现有方法的对比实验 (Comparison with State-of-the-Art Methods)
章节结构.核心任务: 在标准基准数据集上展示定量（表格数据）和定性（可视化深度图与误差图）结果，证明整体性能的优越性。

章节结构.子节名称: 特定属性敏感性与控制变量实验 (Sensitivity & Control Variable Experiments)
章节结构.核心任务: 针对特定挑战（如透明度、反射率、噪声），通过控制变量法深入评估算法的鲁棒性和物理极限。
验证网络内部特定模块（如双分支结构、自适应模块）或参数选择的有效性和必要性。

章节结构.子节名称: 真实世界评估与局限性分析 (Real-world Evaluation & Limitation Analysis)
章节结构.核心任务: 展示模型在无Ground Truth的真实场景中的表现，并客观分析模型的优势与当前存在的弱点。

Experiments.内容逻辑: 整体遵循“基础验证-深度剖析-内部机制-外部泛化”的递进逻辑。首先通过“实验设置”奠定基础，接着利用“SOTA对比”确立方法的总体领先地位（宏观证明）；随后通过“In addition to...”等过渡句引入“控制变量实验”，从宏观转向微观，探究模型对特定物理属性（如透明度、反射率）的敏感度和边界（深度剖析）；接着通过“消融实验”解释性能提升的内在原因（机制验证）；最后以“真实世界评估”收尾，验证泛化能力并客观探讨局限性，形成严密的论证闭环。
论证手法: 定量数据支撑：使用表格列出MSE、Bad Pix等具体指标，进行精确的数值对比。
定性可视化对比：通过展示估计深度图（Depth map）和误差图（Error map），直观呈现不同方法在细节、边缘和伪影处的表现差异。
控制变量法：固定场景其他元素，仅梯度改变单一物理属性（如透明度从90%降至20%，反射率递减），以测试算法的敏感性和失效边界。
消融分析：通过移除或替换核心组件（如two-branch structure），对比性能变化以证明该设计的不可或缺性。
客观辩证分析：在论证优势（Strength）的同时，主动暴露弱点（Weakness）（如前景透明度过低时背景重建困难），增强论文的严谨性和学术可信度。

实验设置与总体概述.模板: We evaluate our approach through experiments conducted on [Datasets] for comprehensive comparison. Based on the metrics defined in [Ref], the experimental results demonstrate that...
实验设置与总体概述.原文示例: We evaluate our approach through experiments conducted on HCInew, Inria, Stanford, and UrbanLF datasets for comprehensive comparison. Based on the metrics defined in [7], the experimental results demonstrate that our method surpasses state-of-the-art appr[oaches].

SOTA对比与性能提升.模板: In particular, we achieve a significant boost in performances for [Specific Targets], of [X]%, [Y]%, and [Z]%.
SOTA对比与性能提升.原文示例: In particular, we achieve a significant boost in performances for ToM surfaces, of 4.37, 5.72, 8.97, 11.12 and 11.57%.

控制变量与敏感性实验.模板: In addition to the comparison on public datasets, in order to explore the sensitivity of the algorithms to [Property], we conduct a control variable experiment on the data [Scene] with different [Property levels].
控制变量与敏感性实验.原文示例: In addition to the comparison on public datasets, in order to explore the sensitivity of the algorithms to transparency, we conduct a control variable experiment on the data David with different transparency.

消融实验.模板: We conduct a set of ablation experiments to demonstrate the importance of the [Module/Structure] design.
消融实验.原文示例: ...experiments as a set of ablation experiments to demonstrate the importance of the two-branch structure design.

优缺点客观评价.模板: The strength of our method is that [Strength description]. The weakness of our method is that [Weakness description].
优缺点客观评价.原文示例: The strength of our method is that it is not significantly affected by the transparency of non-Lambertian objects... The weakness of our method is that it is challenging to reconstruct background objects when the foreground transparency is too low.

章节结构.子节名称: 研究总结与核心贡献回顾
章节结构.核心任务: 重申研究背景与目的，高度概括本文提出的核心方法、模型、数据集或理论框架。

章节结构.子节名称: 关键发现与技术优势阐述
章节结构.核心任务: 详述理论推导成果、技术创新点、实验验证结果，并通过对比突出相较于现有方法的优越性。

章节结构.子节名称: 局限性与未来工作展望
章节结构.核心任务: 客观指出当前研究在数据、场景或理论上的局限性，并提出具体的未来改进方向、理论推导计划或应用拓展。

Conclusion.内容逻辑: 整体呈现从“宏观总结”到“微观细节”，再到“未来展望”的递进逻辑。首先高度概括全文的核心工作和主要贡献（What we did），接着深入阐述具体的技术亮点、实验证明和对比优势（Why it is good/What we found），最后客观审视当前研究的边界并顺理成章地引出未来的改进方向（What is next）。各子节间通过逻辑连接词（如However, Finally, Meanwhile）和语义转折（从成果总结转向局限性分析，如'The current validation is based on...'）实现自然过渡。
论证手法: 概括归纳法：将全文的核心方法、数据集和实验结果进行高度凝练的总结，提炼核心贡献。
对比论证：通过与基线方法或现有文献对比（如指出传统方法无法处理某问题而本文可以，或放弃传统机制采用新机制），突出本文方法的优越性和创新性。
实验与数据支撑：引用实验验证过程和结果（如“A series of experiments... validate”）来证明方法的有效性、鲁棒性和高精度。
理论推导与相关性印证：提及理论层面的证明、方程推导或相关性分析（如“we show that...”, “Correlation analysis... corroborates”），以增强结论的科学严谨性。

研究总结与核心贡献回顾: In this paper, we propose a novel [Method] for [Task] from [Data/Source]. (原文示例: In this paper, we propose a novel BRDF-invariant shape and reflectance estimation method for glossy surfaces from light-field cameras.)

To address the core requirements for [Problem], this work constructs [Dataset], proposes and validates [Model] – a framework for [Task]. (原文示例: To address the core requirements for intelligent detection of human thermal comfort..., this work constructs TABD, proposes and validates TLA-DETR...)
关键发现与技术优势阐述: [Feature/Component] can also be handled by our method, while this is not possible using [Baselines]. (原文示例: Spatially-varying BRDFs can also be handled by our method, while this is not possible using [5, 6, 7].)

A series of experiments conducted on [Dataset] validate the superiority of [Model] across multiple dimensions. (原文示例: A series of experiments conducted on TABD validate the superiority of TLA-DETR across multiple dimensions.)

According to the characteristics of [Data], multiple key optimization components are incorporated into [Module] to effectively enhance [Capability]. (原文示例: According to the characteristics of infrared data, multiple key optimization components are incorporated into the encoder/decoder to effectively enhance the model’s spatio-temporal feature extraction...)
局限性与未来工作展望: Finally, since we showed that there is actually inherent ambiguity in [Problem], future work includes deriving [Specific Direction]. (原文示例: Finally, since we showed that there is actually inherent ambiguity in light-fields..., future work includes deriving its ambiguity-space...)

The current validation is based on [Limitation]. We will consider [Improvement] to ensure robust performance..., and strive to explore broader applications... (原文示例: The current validation is based on a limited participant group and a single building context. We will consider individual differences and environmental diversity to ensure robust performance...)
